_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide input for targeting community meetings (e.g., Targeting Issues Working Group (TIWG), Military Targeting Committee (MTC), etc.).
reference_document_element_description: Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. DG-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-008 (DG, cosine: 0.426), LS-T-009 (LS, cosine: 0.421).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.3/10 (raw 0.331). Shared vocabulary: [community, issues]. DCWF-only terms [committee, etc, group, input, meetings, military] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, channels, council, data, domain, escalating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.837 (P=0.821, R=0.853). R exceeds P by 0.032 — the WIDAI KSA's 21 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 17 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:5.1%, N:51.5%, C:43.4%). No dominant classification for "Provide input for targeting community meetings (e.g., Targeting Issues Working G" vs "Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representi" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.439 > STS 0.331 (gap +0.107). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [community, issues] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 5.9%. Shared tokens: [community, issues]. DCWF-only: [committee, etc, group, input, meetings, military]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, channels, council, data, domain, escalating].
